requirement_topic.en: OCPP Interoperability, EMC, and Back-Office Integration for Networked Chargers
requirement_topic.zh: 联网充电桩OCPP互操作、EMC及后台集成
requirement_topic.zht: 聯網充電樁OCPP互操作、EMC及後台集成

summary.en: Mozambique does not currently operate a national EV charging management platform equivalent to Qatar's Tarsheed programme, consistent with the nascent state of its EV market as of 2026-06-14. For networked public chargers deployed by private operators or under donor-funded projects, OCPP (Open Charge Point Protocol) is the internationally-adopted back-office communication standard and is the de facto expectation for IEC-aligned deployments in Mozambique. OCPP compliance enables remote monitoring, fault notification, access control, and billing integration with back-office management systems. EMC compliance with IEC 61000 series standards is required for grid-connected electrical equipment under INNOQ's IEC-based conformity framework. As Mozambique's EV charging infrastructure develops, back-office integration and EMC requirements are expected to follow the IEC 62196 / IEC 61851 ecosystem adopted internationally.
summary.zh: 截至2026年6月14日，与卡塔尔Tarsheed计划相当的国家电动汽车充电管理平台在莫桑比克尚不存在，与其电动汽车市场的起步状态相符。对于私营运营商或援助资金项目部署的联网公共充电桩，OCPP（开放充电点协议）是国际通行的后台通信标准，也是莫桑比克IEC对标部署的事实预期。OCPP合规性支持远程监控、故障通知、访问控制和后台管理系统计费集成。IEC 61000系列EMC合规性适用于INNOQ基于IEC合格评定框架下的并网电气设备。随着莫桑比克电动汽车充电基础设施的发展，后台集成和EMC要求预计将遵循国际采用的IEC 62196 / IEC 61851体系。
summary.zht: 截至2026年6月14日，與卡塔爾Tarsheed計劃相當的國家電動汽車充電管理平台在莫三比克尚不存在，與其電動汽車市場的起步狀態相符。對於私營運營商或援助資金項目部署的聯網公共充電樁，OCPP（開放充電點協議）是國際通行的後台通訊標準，也是莫三比克IEC對標部署的事實預期。OCPP合規性支持遠程監控、故障通知、訪問控制和後台管理系統計費集成。IEC 61000系列EMC合規性適用於INNOQ基於IEC合格評定框架下的併網電氣設備。隨著莫三比克電動汽車充電基礎設施的發展，後台集成和EMC要求預計將遵循國際採用的IEC 62196 / IEC 61851體系。

standards_or_laws: OCPP (Open Charge Point Protocol) — back-office communication for networked chargers
IEC 63584 — Standard for OCPP adoption in EV charging (international context)
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility (EMC) for grid-connected electrical equipment
INNOQ (Instituto Nacional de Normalização e Qualidade) — IEC-based conformity framework for electrical imports
IEC 61851-24 — Digital communication between a DC EV charging station and an EV for control of DC charging

summary.en: China DC fast chargers commonly use the GB/T 27930-2023 communication protocol between the off-board charger and the battery management system, which is a CAN bus protocol and is not interoperable with OCPP back-office systems or the CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 communication stack. China AC chargers may implement proprietary or OCPP-based back-office protocols depending on the operator, but the underlying connector and signaling stack still uses CC/CP rather than the PP/CP signaling required for IEC 62196 Type 2 and OCPP-integrated systems. China EMC evidence is certified under GB/T 17626 series (corresponding to IEC 61000), which may provide a useful engineering starting point but requires INNOQ-accepted IEC 61000 accredited evidence for Mozambique imports.
summary.zh: 中国直流快充通常采用GB/T 27930-2023通信协议（非车载充电机与电池管理系统之间的CAN总线协议），该协议与OCPP后台系统或CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通信栈不兼容。中国交流充电桩根据运营商情况可能采用私有或基于OCPP的后台协议，但底层接口和信号栈仍使用CC/CP，而非IEC 62196 Type 2及OCPP集成系统所要求的PP/CP信号。中国EMC证据依据GB/T 17626系列（对应IEC 61000）认证，可作为有用的工程参考起点，但莫桑比克进口须提供INNOQ认可的IEC 61000认可证据。
summary.zht: 中國直流快充通常採用GB/T 27930-2023通訊協議（非車載充電機與電池管理系統之間的CAN總線協議），該協議與OCPP後台系統或CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通訊棧不兼容。中國交流充電樁根據運營商情況可能採用私有或基於OCPP的後台協議，但底層接口和信號棧仍使用CC/CP，而非IEC 62196 Type 2及OCPP集成系統所要求的PP/CP信號。中國EMC證據依據GB/T 17626系列（對應IEC 61000）認證，可作為有用的工程參考起點，但莫三比克進口須提供INNOQ認可的IEC 61000認可證據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 27930-2023 — Communication protocols between off-board conductive charger and battery management system
GB/T 17626 series — EMC standards (corresponding to IEC 61000)

gap.en: Exporters must confirm: (1) the charger firmware supports the OCPP version required by the project operator or site owner; (2) GB/T 27930 DC communication is replaced with the IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 stack for CCS2 DC stations; (3) EMC test reports to IEC 61000 from an ILAC-recognised laboratory are prepared for INNOQ conformity assessment; (4) remote monitoring and fault-reporting functions meet the requirements of the specific operator or project; (5) as Mozambique may not have a mandated national OCPP platform, the specific back-office integration requirements should be confirmed with the project owner or operator before commissioning. A charger with only GB/T 27930 DC communication and no OCPP back-office implementation is not suitable for IEC-aligned networked deployments in Mozambique.
gap.zh: 出口商须确认：(1) 充电桩固件支持项目运营商或场地方要求的OCPP版本；(2) CCS2直流充电站将GB/T 27930直流通信替换为IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通信栈；(3) 向ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 61000 EMC测试报告，用于INNOQ合格评定；(4) 远程监控和故障报告功能满足具体运营商或项目要求；(5) 由于莫桑比克可能尚无强制性国家OCPP平台，应在调试前向项目业主或运营商确认具体后台集成要求。仅支持GB/T 27930直流通信且无OCPP后台实现的充电桩不适用于莫桑比克的IEC对标联网部署。
gap.zht: 出口商須確認：(1) 充電樁固件支持項目運營商或場地方要求的OCPP版本；(2) CCS2直流充電站將GB/T 27930直流通訊替換為IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通訊棧；(3) 向ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 61000 EMC測試報告，用於INNOQ合格評定；(4) 遠程監控和故障報告功能滿足具體運營商或項目要求；(5) 由於莫三比克可能尚無強制性國家OCPP平台，應在調試前向項目業主或運營商確認具體後台集成要求。僅支持GB/T 27930直流通訊且無OCPP後台實現的充電樁不適用於莫三比克的IEC對標聯網部署。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — OCPP is the de facto international standard for networked public chargers; no national mandatory OCPP platform confirmed from official sources as of 2026-06-14; IEC 61000 EMC compliance required under INNOQ conformity framework for electrical imports; confirm with project owner or INNOQ
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 is mandatory for China domestic DC charging communication; it is not OCPP-compatible and cannot substitute for IEC-aligned back-office integration; GB/T 17626 EMC evidence is a starting point but not an IEC 61000 INNOQ-accepted substitute without additional accredited testing

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] OCPP back-office integration is the de facto requirement for networked public chargers in IEC-aligned markets including Mozambique. Chargers with only GB/T 27930 DC communication cannot support IEC-aligned networked deployments without firmware and communication-stack redesign. Confirm EMC evidence against IEC 61000 for INNOQ conformity assessment before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] OCPP后台集成是包括莫桑比克在内的IEC对标市场联网公共充电桩的事实要求。仅支持GB/T 27930直流通信的充电桩在不进行固件和通信栈重新设计的情况下，无法支持IEC对标联网部署。出货前应针对IEC 61000准备EMC证据，用于INNOQ合格评定。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] OCPP後台集成是包括莫三比克在內的IEC對標市場聯網公共充電樁的事實要求。僅支持GB/T 27930直流通訊的充電樁在不進行固件和通訊棧重新設計的情況下，無法支持IEC對標聯網部署。出貨前應針對IEC 61000準備EMC證據，用於INNOQ合格評定。
